title: cheirinia occidentalis
intro: Cheirinia occidentalis, also known as wild chamomile or desert chamomile, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Cheirinia occidentalis has been found to have health benefits such as soothing digestive problems, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Cheirinia occidentalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
